name: collectionByIdentifier
supportNotes: Supports id and handle identifier branches against effective local collection state. customId currently returns null until collection unique-metafield evidence exists.

name: collectionByHandle
supportNotes: Deprecated Shopify root supported as a handle lookup over effective local collection state.

name: customerPaymentMethod
supportNotes: Payment-area scaffold only. The 2026-04-25 harry-test-heelo probe still returned ACCESS_DENIED without read_customer_payment_methods; future capture requires read_customers plus read_customer_payment_methods and should settle revoked/empty payment-method behavior before local overlay support.

name: orderPaymentStatus
supportNotes: Payment-area scaffold only. The 2026-04-25 harry-test-heelo probe can capture unknown-id null behavior; future capture should use safe order/payment status reads and document required order access before local overlay support.

name: paymentCustomization
supportNotes: Payment customization scaffold only. The 2026-04-25 harry-test-heelo probe can capture unknown-id null behavior with read_payment_customizations; future capture should record no-data/null behavior before local overlay support.

name: paymentCustomizations
supportNotes: Payment customization scaffold only. The 2026-04-25 harry-test-heelo probe can capture an empty connection with read_payment_customizations; future capture should record connection filters, empty pages, and pagination shape before local overlay support.

name: paymentTermsTemplates
supportNotes: Payment terms scaffold only. The 2026-04-25 harry-test-heelo probe can capture the template catalog; future capture should also record paymentTermsType filtering before local overlay support.

name: shopPayPaymentRequestReceipt
supportNotes: Shop Pay payment request receipt scaffold only. The 2026-04-25 harry-test-heelo probe can capture unknown-token null behavior; future capture should avoid creating customer-visible payment requests before local overlay support.

name: shopPayPaymentRequestReceipts
supportNotes: Shop Pay payment request receipt scaffold only. The 2026-04-25 harry-test-heelo probe can capture empty connection behavior; future capture should avoid creating customer-visible payment requests before local overlay support.

name: shopifyPaymentsAccount
supportNotes: Snapshot overlay supports the direct root from normalized Shopify Payments account fixtures shared with BusinessEntity.shopifyPaymentsAccount. Safe scalar fields are exposed when captured; payouts, disputes, and balanceTransactions serialize as empty no-data connections until non-empty account activity fixtures exist. Balance, bank account, statement descriptor, payout schedule, and other payment-account-sensitive fields remain explicit unsupported diagnostics. The 2026-04-25 harry-test-heelo capture still returned ACCESS_DENIED without read_shopify_payments/read_shopify_payments_accounts.

name: tenderTransactions
supportNotes: Tender transaction scaffold only. The 2026-04-25 harry-test-heelo probe can capture an empty read-only listing; future capture should preserve payment-details nullability and record no-data connection behavior before local overlay support.

name: customerGenerateAccountActivationUrl
supportNotes: Staged locally with a synthetic non-deliverable activation URL. The original raw mutation is retained in the mutation log for commit replay; runtime support does not request a live Shopify activation URL.

name: customerSendAccountInviteEmail
supportNotes: Buffered locally as a staged outbound invite intent. Runtime support validates the customer, updates local account state to invited when applicable, and keeps the original raw mutation for commit-time email delivery.

name: customerPaymentMethodSendUpdateEmail
supportNotes: Buffered locally as a staged payment-method update-email intent. Runtime support validates that the payment method is present in the local customer-payment graph, preserves the original raw mutation for commit-time delivery, and mirrors Shopify's not-found userError for unknown payment methods.

name: publishablePublish
supportNotes: HAR-177/HAR-163 slices: stages generic Publishable mutations locally when the publishable ID is a Product or Collection. Product-specific productPublish/productUnpublish remain the deeper product publication parity roots; unsupported Publishable targets return local userErrors instead of proxying upstream.

name: publishablePublishToCurrentChannel
supportNotes: HAR-177 product slice: stages generic Publishable mutations locally when the publishable ID is a Product. Product-specific productPublish/productUnpublish remain the deeper product publication parity roots; non-product Publishable targets return local userErrors instead of proxying upstream.

name: publishableUnpublish
supportNotes: HAR-177/HAR-163 slices: stages generic Publishable mutations locally when the publishable ID is a Product or Collection. Product-specific productPublish/productUnpublish remain the deeper product publication parity roots; unsupported Publishable targets return local userErrors instead of proxying upstream.

name: publishableUnpublishToCurrentChannel
supportNotes: HAR-177 product slice: stages generic Publishable mutations locally when the publishable ID is a Product. Product-specific productPublish/productUnpublish remain the deeper product publication parity roots; non-product Publishable targets return local userErrors instead of proxying upstream.

name: shopPolicyUpdate
supportNotes: HAR-173: stages legal policy updates locally by ShopPolicyType, preserves raw mutation requests for commit replay, and overlays downstream shop.shopPolicies reads without proxying supported requests upstream.

name: privacySettings
supportNotes: HAR-250 registry-only privacy read coverage. Keep unimplemented until captured privacySettings evidence and a local privacy settings overlay model exist.

name: consentPolicy
supportNotes: HAR-250 registry-only privacy read coverage. Keep unimplemented until captured consentPolicy evidence and a local consent policy overlay model exist.

name: consentPolicyRegions
supportNotes: HAR-250 registry-only privacy read coverage. Keep unimplemented until captured consentPolicyRegions evidence and a local consent policy region model exist.

name: consentPolicyUpdate
supportNotes: HAR-250 registry-only privacy mutation coverage. Keep unimplemented until live capture and a local consent policy staging model exist; registry presence must not make this a supported passthrough.

name: privacyFeaturesDisable
supportNotes: HAR-250 registry-only privacy mutation coverage. Keep unimplemented until live capture and a local privacy feature staging model exist; registry presence must not make this a supported passthrough.

name: metafieldDefinition
supportNotes: Product-owner definition detail reads are modeled locally from normalized metafield definition state and product-owned metafields.

name: metafieldDefinitions
supportNotes: Product-owner definition catalogs are modeled locally with owner type, namespace, key, pinned, constraint, query, sort, and pagination filters.

name: standardMetafieldDefinitionTemplates
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 standard template catalog root used before standardMetafieldDefinitionEnable. Registry-only declared gap until template catalog capture and modeling exist.

name: metafieldDefinitionCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Do not proxy as supported until metafield-definition state, validation, and affected value migration semantics are modeled.

name: metafieldDefinitionUpdate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires immutable identity checks and validation job semantics before support.

name: metafieldDefinitionDelete
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires deleteAllAssociatedMetafields behavior and asynchronous associated-value deletion semantics before support.

name: metafieldDefinitionPin
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires pinned-position ordering semantics before support.

name: metafieldDefinitionUnpin
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires pinned-position ordering semantics before support.

name: standardMetafieldDefinitionEnable
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires standard template catalog modeling plus created-definition semantics before support.

name: metaobject
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 entry read root. Registry-only declared gap until live capture proves ID lookup nullability, selected field shape, capabilities, references, and empty/no-data behavior.

name: metaobjectByHandle
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 handle lookup root. Registry-only declared gap until type-plus-handle identity, missing-handle nullability, and app-owned type behavior are captured.

name: metaobjects
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 entry connection root. Registry-only declared gap until type-scoped empty connections, pagination, search filters, sorting, and field-value query semantics are captured.

name: metaobjectDefinition
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 definition read root. Registry-only declared gap until ID lookup nullability, field definition ordering, capabilities, access settings, and empty/no-data behavior are captured.

name: metaobjectDefinitionByType
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 definition type lookup root. Registry-only declared gap until type identity, app-reserved type handling, and missing-type nullability are captured.

name: metaobjectDefinitions
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 definition catalog root. Registry-only declared gap until definition pagination, ordering, type filtering, standard-template metadata, and empty connection behavior are captured.

name: metaobjectCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Known unsupported root must not be treated as supported passthrough until field validation, handle generation, capabilities, and downstream read visibility are modeled.

name: metaobjectUpdate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Known unsupported root must not be treated as supported passthrough until field patching, validation, capability changes, and read-after-write behavior are modeled.

name: metaobjectUpsert
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Known unsupported root must not be treated as supported passthrough until create-vs-update identity, handle conflicts, and downstream catalog behavior are modeled.

name: metaobjectDelete
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Known unsupported root must not be treated as supported passthrough until delete payloads, unknown IDs, references, and downstream absence behavior are modeled.

name: metaobjectBulkDelete
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Known unsupported root must not be treated as supported passthrough until bulk selection, partial failures, async job shape, and downstream absence behavior are modeled.

name: metaobjectDefinitionCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Known unsupported root must not be treated as supported passthrough until definition schema validation, capabilities, access, and entry catalog side effects are modeled.

name: metaobjectDefinitionUpdate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Known unsupported root must not be treated as supported passthrough until field definition migrations, validation jobs, access changes, and downstream entry effects are modeled.

name: metaobjectDefinitionDelete
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Known unsupported root must not be treated as supported passthrough until associated entry deletion, unknown-type behavior, and downstream definition absence are modeled.

name: standardMetaobjectDefinitionEnable
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Known unsupported root must not be treated as supported passthrough until standard template catalog capture, enable validation, and created-definition semantics are modeled.

name: customerPaymentMethodCreateFromDuplicationData
supportNotes: Customer payment method scaffold only. Future capture requires write_customers plus write_customer_payment_methods and must avoid creating reusable vaulted payment data without an isolated test customer/payment method lifecycle.

name: customerPaymentMethodCreditCardCreate
supportNotes: Customer payment method scaffold only. Requires write_customers plus write_customer_payment_methods and PCI-sensitive card session inputs; future capture must use safe non-real payment data and record async/processing behavior before local staging support.

name: customerPaymentMethodCreditCardUpdate
supportNotes: Customer payment method scaffold only. Requires write_customers plus write_customer_payment_methods and an isolated vaulted payment method; future capture must avoid real card data and document revoked/updated read-after-write behavior.

name: customerPaymentMethodGetDuplicationData
supportNotes: Customer payment method scaffold only. Future capture requires write_customers plus write_customer_payment_methods and should treat returned duplication data as sensitive ephemeral payment material.

name: customerPaymentMethodGetUpdateUrl
supportNotes: Customer payment method scaffold only. Future capture requires write_customers plus write_customer_payment_methods and must treat returned update URLs as sensitive, expiring customer-payment links.

name: customerPaymentMethodPaypalBillingAgreementCreate
supportNotes: Customer payment method scaffold only. Future capture requires write_customers plus write_customer_payment_methods and isolated PayPal billing-agreement test data before local staging support.

name: customerPaymentMethodPaypalBillingAgreementUpdate
supportNotes: Customer payment method scaffold only. Future capture requires write_customers plus write_customer_payment_methods and an isolated PayPal billing-agreement test method before local staging support.

name: customerPaymentMethodRemoteCreate
supportNotes: Customer payment method scaffold only. Future capture requires write_customers plus write_customer_payment_methods, safe remote gateway identifiers, and polling evidence through customerPaymentMethod before local staging support.

name: customerPaymentMethodRevoke
supportNotes: Customer payment method scaffold only. Future capture requires write_customers plus write_customer_payment_methods and an isolated payment method because revoke is destructive for recurring billing flows.

name: orderCapture
supportNotes: Stages captured order authorizations locally into CAPTURE transactions, updates downstream financial/capturable fields, and avoids live capture side effects at runtime.

name: orderCreateMandatePayment
supportNotes: Stages mandate-payment jobs locally with session idempotency keys, synthetic paymentReferenceId values, and downstream order transaction/financial-status updates without contacting payment gateways.

name: paymentCustomizationActivation
supportNotes: Payment customization scaffold only. Future capture requires write_payment_customizations and disposable customization records because activation changes checkout payment behavior.

name: paymentCustomizationCreate
supportNotes: Payment customization scaffold only. Future capture requires write_payment_customizations, a test Shopify Function handle, and cleanup for created checkout payment configuration.

name: paymentCustomizationDelete
supportNotes: Payment customization scaffold only. Future capture requires write_payment_customizations and disposable customization records because delete is destructive.

name: paymentCustomizationUpdate
supportNotes: Payment customization scaffold only. Future capture requires write_payment_customizations and disposable customization records because updates can change checkout payment behavior.

name: paymentReminderSend
supportNotes: Payment reminder scaffold only. Future capture requires write_orders and a no-recipient or otherwise safe email plan because the happy path sends a customer-visible payment reminder.

name: paymentTermsCreate
supportNotes: Payment terms scaffold only. Future capture requires write_payment_terms plus order or draft-order access and must use an isolated order because it changes due dates/payment schedules.

name: paymentTermsDelete
supportNotes: Payment terms scaffold only. Future capture requires write_payment_terms plus order or draft-order access and disposable terms because delete changes payment schedules.

name: paymentTermsUpdate
supportNotes: Payment terms scaffold only. Future capture requires write_payment_terms plus order or draft-order access and an isolated payment schedule because updates change due dates/payment status.

name: shopifyPaymentsPayoutAlternateCurrencyCreate
supportNotes: Shopify Payments payout scaffold only. Future capture requires Shopify Payments payout/account access and must not run happy paths on shared stores because it can alter real payout configuration or money movement.

name: transactionVoid
supportNotes: Stages voids for uncaptured local authorization transactions and updates downstream capturable/financial fields without proxying the supported mutation upstream.

name: fulfillment
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 Fulfillment read root. Registry-only declared gap until fulfillment records are modeled as first-class local state outside order-scoped downstream reads.

name: fulfillmentEventCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires fulfillment event status semantics, tracking/shipment-state transitions, and downstream fulfillment/order read visibility before support.

name: assignedFulfillmentOrders
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 fulfillment-order assignment catalog root. Registry-only declared gap until access-scope filtering, assignmentStatus behavior, location filters, and empty-connection semantics are captured.

name: fulfillmentOrder
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 FulfillmentOrder ID lookup root. Registry-only declared gap until fulfillment-order identity, status/requestStatus, line items, holds, deliveryMethod, and access-scope null/error behavior are modeled.

name: fulfillmentOrders
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 all-fulfillment-orders catalog root. Registry-only declared gap until includeClosed, search filters, sort keys, scope-restricted visibility, and cursor/pageInfo behavior are captured.

name: manualHoldsFulfillmentOrders
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 held fulfillment-order catalog root. Registry-only declared gap until hold filtering, supported order query filters, and no-hold empty connection behavior are captured.

name: fulfillmentOrderAcceptCancellationRequest
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires fulfillment-service cancellation request lifecycle, status/requestStatus transitions, merchant request history, and downstream reads before support.

name: fulfillmentOrderAcceptFulfillmentRequest
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires fulfillment-service acceptance semantics, estimated shipped timestamps, request status transitions, and downstream reads before support.

name: fulfillmentOrderCancel
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires replacement fulfillment-order creation, partial remaining-work semantics, and status transitions before support.

name: fulfillmentOrderClose
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires accepted fulfillment-service request semantics, in-progress constraints, and control handoff back to merchant-managed fulfillment before support.

name: fulfillmentOrderHold
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires hold handle/id behavior, multiple active holds per app, limit userErrors, and downstream fulfillmentHolds reads before support.

name: fulfillmentOrderLineItemsPreparedForPickup
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires pickup-specific fulfillment-order line-item states, notification semantics, and downstream deliveryMethod/status visibility before support.

name: fulfillmentOrderMerge
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires merge eligibility, line-item aggregation, replacement/closed order identity behavior, and downstream fulfillmentOrdersForMerge parity before support.

name: fulfillmentOrderMove
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires inventory/location eligibility, partial move split behavior, requestStatus restrictions, and replacement order reads before support.

name: fulfillmentOrderOpen
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires scheduled and progress-reported state transitions plus downstream status/requestStatus reads before support.

name: fulfillmentOrderRejectCancellationRequest
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires cancellation request rejection lifecycle, merchant request records, and post-rejection fulfillment-order status behavior before support.

name: fulfillmentOrderRejectFulfillmentRequest
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires rejection reasons, rejected line-item semantics, merchant request records, and unfulfillable-line behavior before support.

name: fulfillmentOrderReleaseHold
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires hold id filtering, release-all behavior, externalId tracking, and downstream fulfillmentHolds/status changes before support.

name: fulfillmentOrderReportProgress
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires progress report state, status transitions, and interaction with move/open restrictions before support.

name: fulfillmentOrderReschedule
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires scheduled fulfillment-order semantics, future fulfillAt validation, and downstream fulfillAt/status visibility before support.

name: fulfillmentOrdersReroute
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires order-routing location selection, included/excluded location semantics, and assignedLocation updates before support.

name: fulfillmentOrdersSetFulfillmentDeadline
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires fulfillBy/deadline mutation semantics and downstream fulfillment-order deadline reads before support.

name: fulfillmentOrderSplit
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires quantity-based line-item splitting, remaining fulfillment-order identity, and downstream line item totals before support.

name: fulfillmentOrderSubmitCancellationRequest
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires cancellation request creation, merchant request history, notification semantics, and requestStatus transitions before support.

name: fulfillmentOrderSubmitFulfillmentRequest
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires full and partial fulfillment request semantics, split-on-partial behavior, notifyCustomer handling, and requestStatus transitions before support.

name: fulfillmentService
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 FulfillmentService ID lookup root. Snapshot reads resolve from the local fulfillment-service graph and return null for missing IDs; `Shop.fulfillmentServices` remains a nested shop field rather than a top-level list root.

name: fulfillmentServiceCreate
supportNotes: Locally stages third-party fulfillment-service creation with associated fulfillment-service location visibility, callback URL persistence, inventory/tracking flags, and raw mutation log retention. External callback, inventory, tracking, and fulfillment-order notification endpoints are not invoked.

name: fulfillmentServiceDelete
supportNotes: Locally stages fulfillment-service deletion, including missing-id userErrors and associated location side effects for DELETE/TRANSFER versus KEEP inventory actions. Inventory movement itself remains in-memory only and no external endpoints are invoked.

name: fulfillmentServiceUpdate
supportNotes: Locally stages name, callback URL, tracking, inventory-management, and requires-shipping-method updates. The service handle remains stable while the associated fulfillment-service location name follows the service name.

name: availableCarrierServices
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL carrier-service availability root. Registry-only declared gap until active carrier service/location pairing and empty-list behavior are captured.

name: carrierService
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL DeliveryCarrierService ID lookup root. Registry-only declared gap until callback URL, active/service discovery flags, app ownership, and missing-service nullability are captured.

name: carrierServices
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL DeliveryCarrierService catalog root. Registry-only declared gap until active-only behavior, sort keys, pagination, and app/scopes visibility are captured.

name: carrierServiceCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_shipping access behavior, plan eligibility userErrors, callback URL validation, and downstream carrier-service reads before support.

name: carrierServiceDelete
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires app ownership checks, deletedId/userErrors behavior, and downstream catalog absence before support.

name: carrierServiceUpdate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires app ownership checks, callback/active/service discovery field validation, and downstream read visibility before support.

name: deliveryProfile
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 DeliveryProfile ID lookup root. Registry-only declared gap until nested location groups, zones, method definitions, product variant assignments, and missing-profile nullability are captured.

name: deliveryProfiles
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 DeliveryProfile catalog root. Registry-only declared gap until merchantOwnedOnly, pagination, default profile behavior, legacy mode, and empty/permission behavior are captured.

name: locationsAvailableForDeliveryProfilesConnection
supportNotes: Delivery-profile origin-location helper root. Registry-only declared gap until active origin location eligibility, pickup/local-delivery/shipping-rate configuration, and cursor behavior are captured.

name: deliveryProfileCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires nested profile/location-group/zone/rate method validation, variant assignment, and downstream profile reads before support.

name: deliveryProfileRemove
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires asynchronous job payload semantics, default-profile restrictions, and downstream profile/catalog absence before support.

name: deliveryProfileUpdate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires nested diff semantics for groups, zones, method definitions, variant/selling-plan associations, legacy-mode transitions, and downstream profile reads before support.

name: orderEditAddShippingLine
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Order edit support exists for variant quantity changes, but shipping-line edit roots need captured calculated-order shippingLine/totals behavior before support.

name: orderEditRemoveShippingLine
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires captured calculated-order removal semantics, total recalculation, and downstream order shippingLines visibility before support.

name: orderEditUpdateShippingLine
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires captured calculated-order update semantics, tax/discount interactions, total recalculation, and downstream order shippingLines visibility before support.

name: discountCodeBasicCreate
supportNotes: HAR-198 captures validation guardrails only. Keep unimplemented until full local discount lifecycle staging and read-after-write emulation exist.

name: discountCodeBasicUpdate
supportNotes: HAR-198 captures validation guardrails only. Keep unimplemented until full local discount lifecycle staging and read-after-write emulation exist.

name: discountCodeBxgyCreate
supportNotes: HAR-198 captures validation guardrails only. Keep unimplemented until full local discount lifecycle staging and read-after-write emulation exist.

name: discountCodeFreeShippingCreate
supportNotes: HAR-198 captures validation guardrails only. Keep unimplemented until full local discount lifecycle staging and read-after-write emulation exist.

name: discountCodeBulkDeactivate
supportNotes: HAR-198 captures validation guardrails only. Keep unimplemented until full local discount lifecycle staging and read-after-write emulation exist.

name: discountAutomaticBxgyCreate
supportNotes: HAR-198 captures validation guardrails only. Keep unimplemented until full local discount lifecycle staging and read-after-write emulation exist.

name: discountAutomaticFreeShippingCreate
supportNotes: HAR-198 captures validation guardrails only. Keep unimplemented until full local discount lifecycle staging and read-after-write emulation exist.

name: discountAutomaticBulkDelete
supportNotes: HAR-198 captures validation guardrails only. Keep unimplemented until full local discount lifecycle staging and read-after-write emulation exist.

name: discountCodeAppCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only app-managed discount safety gap. Unsupported runtime requests still use the generic passthrough escape hatch, which would hit Shopify, because Shopify Functions app-discount staging requires captured appDiscountType/functionId fixtures and a local model that does not execute external Function logic.

name: discountCodeAppUpdate
supportNotes: Registry-only app-managed discount safety gap. Unsupported runtime requests still use the generic passthrough escape hatch, which would hit Shopify, because Shopify Functions app-discount staging requires captured appDiscountType/functionId fixtures and a local model that does not execute external Function logic.

name: discountAutomaticAppCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only app-managed discount safety gap. Unsupported runtime requests still use the generic passthrough escape hatch, which would hit Shopify, because Shopify Functions app-discount staging requires captured appDiscountType/functionId fixtures and a local model that does not execute external Function logic.

name: discountAutomaticAppUpdate
supportNotes: Registry-only app-managed discount safety gap. Unsupported runtime requests still use the generic passthrough escape hatch, which would hit Shopify, because Shopify Functions app-discount staging requires captured appDiscountType/functionId fixtures and a local model that does not execute external Function logic.

name: marketingActivities
supportNotes: Snapshot/local read support for captured selected fields, empty connections, filtering, sorting, reverse ordering, and cursor/pageInfo shapes. No marketing mutation staging is included.

name: marketingActivity
supportNotes: Snapshot/local singular lookup support for captured selected fields. Missing IDs return null; no arbitrary marketing activity records are synthesized.

name: marketingEvent
supportNotes: Snapshot/local singular lookup support for captured selected fields. Missing IDs return null; no arbitrary marketing event records are synthesized.

name: marketingEvents
supportNotes: Snapshot/local read support for captured selected fields, empty connections, filtering, sorting, reverse ordering, and cursor/pageInfo shapes. No marketing mutation staging is included.

name: marketingActivityCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for payload, validation, status transitions, and downstream read visibility.

name: marketingActivityUpdate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for update payloads, userErrors, and downstream activity/event reads.

name: marketingActivityCreateExternal
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for external remoteId/UTM fields, userErrors, and downstream list/detail visibility.

name: marketingActivityUpdateExternal
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for external activity identity, status updates, and downstream list/detail visibility.

name: marketingActivityUpsertExternal
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for create-vs-update behavior, remoteId identity, and downstream list/detail visibility.

name: marketingActivityDeleteExternal
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for deletion payloads, unknown IDs, and downstream absence behavior.

name: marketingActivitiesDeleteAllExternal
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for asynchronous job payloads and blocked create/update behavior while deletion is pending.

name: marketingEngagementCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for activity-level and channel-level engagement metrics and report visibility.

name: marketingEngagementsDelete
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for channel-level deletion semantics and userErrors.

name: segment
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured read_customers segment detail baseline. Snapshot mode serves captured selected fields locally and returns Shopify-like null plus NOT_FOUND for unknown segment IDs.

name: segments
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured catalog baseline. Snapshot mode preserves captured cursor/pageInfo payloads when hydrated and otherwise returns an empty connection; broader search/sort grammar remains unsupported until captured.

name: segmentsCount
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured count precision baseline. Snapshot mode returns captured count/precision when hydrated and EXACT zero for empty local state.

name: segmentFilters
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured filter metadata baseline. Snapshot mode preserves captured selected filter fields or returns an empty connection when no metadata has been hydrated.

name: segmentFilterSuggestions
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured filter suggestion baseline for a search argument. Snapshot mode preserves captured suggestion payloads or returns an empty connection; uncaptured search grammar remains unsupported.

name: segmentValueSuggestions
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured value suggestion baseline for customer_tags. Snapshot mode preserves captured suggestion payloads or returns an empty connection; uncaptured filters remain unsupported.

name: segmentMigrations
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured migration catalog baseline. Snapshot mode preserves captured migration connection shape or returns an empty connection.

name: customerSegmentMembers
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap. Requires read_customers and unrestricted/protected-customer-data capture for member pagination, statistics, and empty membership behavior.

name: customerSegmentMembersQuery
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap. Requires read_customers and unrestricted/protected-customer-data capture for asynchronous query job shape and missing-job behavior.

name: customerSegmentMembership
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap. Requires read_customers and unrestricted/protected-customer-data capture for membership boolean maps, unknown segment IDs, and empty responses.

name: customerSegmentMembersQueryCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_customers and protected-customer-data captures for asynchronous job identity, validation, and downstream query reads.

name: segmentCreate
supportNotes: HAR-216 stages segment creation locally with synthetic IDs/timestamps, captured blank/invalid-query validation, Shopify-like duplicate-name suffixing, and downstream segment catalog/count/detail reads.

name: segmentUpdate
supportNotes: HAR-216 stages segment updates locally with captured unknown-ID/validation userErrors, query/name replacement, duplicate-name suffixing, and read-after-write visibility.

name: segmentDelete
supportNotes: HAR-216 stages segment deletion locally, returns captured unknown-ID userErrors, and removes deleted segments from downstream detail/catalog/count reads.

name: marketLocalizableResource
supportNotes: Supports product metafield-backed MarketLocalizableResource reads for the current 2026-04 METAFIELD resource type.

name: marketLocalizableResources
supportNotes: Supports resourceType: METAFIELD over product metafields; METAOBJECT returns the Shopify-like empty local slice until metaobject state exists.

name: marketLocalizableResourcesByIds
supportNotes: Supports product metafield resource IDs and ignores unknown IDs with Shopify-like empty connection behavior.

name: marketLocalizationsRegister
supportNotes: Stages market-specific values for product metafield resources only; validates market ID, key, digest, blank value, and missing input without upstream writes.

name: marketLocalizationsRemove
supportNotes: Removes staged market-specific product metafield values locally and returns removed localization payloads.
